title: nestegis elliptica
intro: Nestegis elliptica, also known as the New Zealand cherry or titoki, is a small tree or shrub native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Oleaceae. The plant's leaves and bark have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nestegis elliptica include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues due to its antimicrobial properties. Nestegis elliptica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
